description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a flat roof adorned with a red and white geometric pattern. The front facade includes a spacious balcony with a round table and chairs, as well as a covered porch supported by two columns. Large windows and glass doors provide ample natural light and visual connection between the interior and exterior spaces. The house is two stories tall, with the upper level set back to create outdoor living areas. The exterior is finished in white with red and gray accents, and the property sits on a rectangular plot with green lawn sections. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, emphasizing functional outdoor spaces and geometric forms.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat, red-and-white patterned roof, large windows, balconies, and a covered porch, finished in white with red and gray accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, covered porch, balcony with outdoor furniture, and large windows.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the sloped roofline, upper balcony, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain facade, minimal detailing, and no visible windows or doors.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the stepped roof, balcony, and a small section of green lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with two columns, a wide glass door, and a balcony above.
